reviews.title: Terrible housekeeping. Hygiene needs improved
reviews.positives: Look and feel of the room
reviews.negatives:
This is one of the worst 5 star hotel I have stayed at.
They have a huge hygiene issue when it comes to housekeeping. I had a stain on my bedsheets at night and I called the housekeeping to clean my room and change my bedsheets. They cleaned the room and didn’t change the bedsheets as I found the same stain.
I had an issue with the bathroom sink as it was clogging and wasn’t draining properly. I called the reception for 3 days complaining about the same issue where each day they tell me it’s fixed: when it’s not fixed. Same issue with the bathtub.
They didn’t even fix the issues nor offered me to change the room.
The valet service is a pain as it’s shared with La Perle. They don’t give much attention to the hotel guests.
The restaurant is impossible to have a breakfast at. One restaurant shared with two hotels and I ended up waiting and a long queue without eventually having breakfast.
The TV room is not a smart TV and I couldnt stream any of my shows.
Overall, terrible stay with no one from the hotel team to fix issue except an apology when I was leaving. I wouldn’t recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: A Nightmare Stay – Unprofessional, Unsafe, and Unhygienic
reviews.positives: except for the location there was nothing we liked
reviews.negatives:
A Nightmare Stay – Unprofessional, Unsafe, and Unhygienic

I have traveled extensively, but my experience at this hotel stands out as the worst. If you’re considering staying here, please read on.

Security Concerns:
After six nights, I was abruptly awakened at 4 AM by hotel security demanding my ID. Despite being a registered guest, they failed to check their system and insisted on a random security check. This invasive and unprofessional behavior disrupted my sleep and made me feel unsafe.

Cleanliness Issues:
The hotel’s cleanliness is appalling. I had to change rooms twice due to the filthy conditions. The rooms are outdated, dirty, and poorly maintained. When housekeeping and a supervisor finally inspected the room, they were visibly shocked and took photographs of the state it was in. The sink and shower drains were clogged, requiring multiple maintenance visits, yet the issues persisted.

Poor Management:
The hotel’s management is disorganized and unresponsive. They forced us to return to the hotel for a room change, only to make us wait two hours because the room wasn’t ready. This lack of coordination ruined our plans for the day.

Unsafe Environment:
The hotel transforms into a chaotic environment from 9 PM to 5 AM. It becomes a hub for illicit activities, making it feel more like a nightclub than a place of rest. The constant noise and questionable activities made it impossible to relax or feel secure.

Conclusion:
This hotel fails on every front—security, cleanliness, management, and overall environment. I strongly advise against staying here. Your well-being and peace of mind are worth more than the stress and discomfort this establishment offers.

reviews.title: Decent Hotel
reviews.text:
Pros:

Spacious and clean rooms

Quiet environment

Nice facilities with multiple swimming pools


Cons:

Check-in was delayed, we waited around 1.5 hours for our room

Bathroom design is impractical: the bathtub is open to the bedroom and water easily spills onto the floor, leaving it wet

Car collection from valet took about 30 minutes

Breakfast was disappointing with limited variety and average quality

When we ordered food from outside and asked hotel service for disposable cutlery and some ice, they agreed but said it would cost 30 AED — not what I’d expect from a Hilton hotel


Overall:
It’s a decent hotel with good facilities, but the service and certain design/quality issues made it fall short of Hilton’s usual standards.

reviews.title: Hotel and club
reviews.text:
Exceptional Hotel Stay with an Unforgettable Club Experience!

I had the pleasure of staying at this hotel recently, and from check-in to check-out, everything exceeded my expectations. The hotel itself is beautifully maintained, with modern, elegant interiors and a welcoming atmosphere. My room was spotless, spacious, and well-equipped with everything I needed for a comfortable stay.

What truly made this trip stand out was the hotel’s incredible club. It was more than just a lounge – it felt like a private retreat. The service was impeccable, available around the clock. Whether it was a refreshing drink, a quick snack, or personalized assistance, the staff was always on hand with a smile and a great attitude. Their attention to detail and commitment to guest satisfaction were remarkable.

The club offered a perfect space to unwind, socialize, or even get some work done in a relaxed yet upscale environment. It was the ideal mix of comfort and class, with high-quality food and drinks served throughout the day.

The overall service at the hotel was equally impressive. Everyone from the front desk to housekeeping was professional, courteous, and genuinely helpful. I truly felt like a valued guest.

If you're looking for a luxurious, hassle-free stay with top-tier amenities and outstanding service, this hotel should be at the top of your list. I’m already looking forward to my next visit

I would definitely rate our stay 10/10

- The hotel has very good amenities. You have access to two pools and I like the timings which is until 12 am for those who prefer night swimming. Gym is 24/7. Restaurant has good food options.
- The restaurant has a way-cool vibe — clientele, ambience, and food alike
- The hotel interiors are very unique. 
- The ac temperature can be set to the temperature I prefer.  Unlike other hotels where we still feel hot.
- Staff are very helpful, from reception, customer service, doorman, 

Other hotels just kept to the standard but V hotel stands out due to their unique, good quality, and exceptional service

Dear Juma,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We are pleased to hear that you found our staff to be helpful and efficient. We strive to provide excellent service to all our guests.

Regarding your comments about breakfast, we aim to offer a diverse selection to cater to the varied preferences of our guests. We appreciate your observation about the large Indian community and will consider ways to further diversify our offerings.

Regarding the condition of our furniture, we apologize if it did not meet your expectations. Your feedback helps us identify areas for improvement, and we will certainly take this into consideration as we continue to update and maintain our facilities.

Thank you again for sharing your thoughts with us. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a more enjoyable experience in the future. 

Kind regards,

Nagy Nagaty
Hotel Manager

There is no question on where I will be staying during my next visit to Dubai. It will be the V Hotel.

I had a fantastic stay at V Hotel in Dubai’s business district. The service was exceptional from start to finish, professional, attentive, and genuinely welcoming. The location is very convenient with easy access around the city, close to Downtown Dubai yet far enough to feel calm and not crowded.
One of the highlights was definitely the breakfast. Excellent variety, high quality, and absolutely worth every penny. Everything felt well organized, clean, and thoughtfully done, making the entire experience smooth and enjoyable.
I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for comfort, great service, and a prime but relaxed location in Dubai.

( Special thanks to the house keeping lady) I have ordered more than once from the room dining, and the food was great ,delicious, hot, and delivered before the said time( mixed grill and cold Mazza not to be missed!) 
When I needed a thing from the hotel all the staff wanted to help( really something you will notice it) thank you Romany from the reception desk team for his support with my room keys
The Elevator waiting time was less than 30 seconds most of time ( great).
All the staff were perfect and exceeded my expectation, well organized trained team, and that reflects the hotel great management 
Thank you and looking forward to visit you again
